name: O-2 (SS-63)
events: 14 Nov 1942 USS O-2 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
15 Nov 1942 USS O-2 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
21 Dec 1942 USS O-2 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
22 Dec 1942 USS O-2 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
18 Jul 1945 USS O-2 departed New London, Connecticut for the Philadelphia Navy Yard for decommissioning.
20 Jul 1945 USS O-2 arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for decommissioning.
